ItacPersonItem.Notes: Not mentioned by Maylender as a member of the Riaccesi Academy in Palermo. According to Mongitore, Palamenghi became a member of the Gelati in Bologna and the Infecondi in Rome. For a biographical account see Antonino Mongitore, Bibliotheca Sicula, Didaci Bua, Palermo, Vol.I, p. 168 (BL Shelfmark:610.m.10.); Diego Ciccarelli (a cura di), La Biblioteca Francescana di Palermo, Palermo, 1995.
ItacPersonItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
